[Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment Preview]

A Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment will begin on 1/6 (Tue)!

💌Pick-Up Student: 3★ Kanna, 3★ Chiaki
🗓️Pick-Up Recruitment Schedule: 1/6 (Tue) 2:00 AM – 1/13 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)
